THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PENNEY, BROOKS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2735 MISSION STREET #7, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA $1,091.39 RENT, $400.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,611.39, STAYED UNTIL JUL-26-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, DFT TO VACATE BY 8AM 7-26-95 W/PREMISES FREE OF DEBRIS & KEYS TO LAW OFFICE OF PLTF COUNSL. IF DFT COMPLIES W/STIP PLTF WILL FILE MOT VACATE JUDGMNT & DISMISS. DFT WAIVES RIGHT TO SEEK FURTH STAY. MUTUAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS. SECURITY DEPOSIT IF ANY RETAINED BY PLTF.
